intro.title: Get Rewarded:
intro.subtitle: <0>Real cash</0> from day 1
intro.body: Here's exactly how your 30-day Welcome Package plays out on Cloudbet:
intro.card1Body: Your first deposit kicks it all off - and activates real rewards from Day 1.
intro.card2Body: Earn rakeback and daily reloads in casino, plus weekly reloads in sports.
intro.card3Body: Day 30 brings your biggest reward — then straight into Cloudbet Rewards.

perks.title:
Most sites make you jump through hoops.
<0>We don't.
perks.body: From your first bet, you're playing for cash. Not credits. Not funny money. Real cash you can withdraw or keep betting with instantly.

first30Days.title: Your <0>first 30 days</0> look like this:
first30Days.list1: <0>Daily casino cash drops:</0> Bet today, claim real cash tomorrow.
first30Days.list2: <0>Casino rakeback:</0> 10% of the house edge back on every bet — part hits your wallet instantly, and the rest unlocks daily on your Rewards Calendar.
first30Days.list3: <0>Weekly sports cash drops:</0> Instant cash unlocks each Friday.
first30Days.list4: <0>The Cash Vault:</0> A cash reward that grows with your play and unlocks on Day 30.
first30Days.body: Players can unlock up to $2,500 in reloads and casino rakeback — before the Vault even opens.

rewards.title: Day 31 is when things get <0>really good</0>
rewards.body: After your Welcome Package, you graduate into <0>Cloudbet Rewards</0> - the most generous loyalty program online.
rewards.card1Body: Earn up to 25% boosted rakeback on every casino bet when you play with TURBO.
rewards.card2Body: Get instant cash every time you level up, from Silver to Blue Diamond and every tier between.
rewards.card3Body: Climb through the Blue Diamond tier and unlock intra-tier level-up rewards worth up to $9.97M.
rewards.morePerksBody: Keep enjoying all the casino and sports cash drops you loved from the Cloudbet Welcome Package.

faq.title: Welcome Package FAQ
faq.a1: No. The Vault is on top of your daily rewards.
faq.a2: No. Your first deposit activates it automatically.
faq.q3: What happens if I don't hit $2,500 in 30 days?
faq.a3: You keep everything you've claimed, and graduate to Cloudbet Rewards.
faq.a4: No, it's a one-time package — but Cloudbet Rewards keeps paying out.
faq.q5: How long does the Welcome Package last?
faq.a5: The Welcome Package is valid for 30 days from the time of your first deposit, or until you reach the $2,500 cap – whichever comes first.
faq.q6: When do I get my rakeback?
faq.a6: A portion lands instantly in your wallet. The rest unlocks daily on your Rewards Calendar, so there's always new cash waiting.

cta.title: Don't wait for "someday" rewards.
